'''pagupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qsar|qsar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qsar|qsar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pagupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pægipith|pægipith]] || [[word:pægipij|pægipij]] || [[word:pægipish|pægipish]] || [[word:pægipi|pægipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:paguguputh|paguguputh]] || [[word:pagugupuj|pagugupuj]] || [[word:pagugupush|pagugupush]] || [[word:pagugupu|pagugupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:paguputh|paguputh]] || [[word:pagupuj|pagupuj]] || [[word:pagupush|pagupush]] || [[word:pagupu|pagupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pagufputh|pagufputh]] || [[word:pagufpuj|pagufpuj]] || [[word:pagufpush|pagufpush]] || [[word:pagufpuf|pagufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:paguputhu|paguputhu]] || [[word:pagupuju|pagupuju]] || [[word:pagupushu|pagupushu]] || [[word:pagupuku|pagupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:paguputh|paguputh]] || [[word:pagupuj|pagupuj]] || [[word:pagupush|pagupush]] || [[word:pagupu|pagupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:paguputhul|paguputhul]] || [[word:pagupujul|pagupujul]] || [[word:pagupushul|pagupushul]] || [[word:pagupukul|pagupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:paguputhuthu|paguputhuthu]] || [[word:pagupujuju|pagupujuju]] || [[word:pagupushushu|pagupushushu]] || [[word:pagupuku|pagupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:paguputhun|paguputhun]] || [[word:pagupujun|pagupujun]] || [[word:pagupushun|pagupushun]] || [[word:pagupukun|pagupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:paguputhuoro|paguputhuoro]] || [[word:pagupujuoro|pagupujuoro]] || [[word:pagupushuoro|pagupushuoro]] || [[word:pagupukuoro|pagupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
